name: Mickey Bass
description: American bassist, composer, arranger and music composer
abstract: Lee Odiss Bass III (May 2, 1943 – February 3, 2022), better known as Mickey Bass, was an American bassist, composer, arranger, and music educator. He played with Chico Freeman, John Hicks, and Kiane Zawadi.

concerts.label: New York Jazz Repertory Company: The Music of George Russell

about_quotes.speaker: Chico Freeman
about_quotes.evidence: I was playing also with Mickey Bass... I then sat in with Mickey Bass and got hired to play... I was working with him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chico Freeman interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 13, 2001
